name: 12.5L Brightroom Open Storage Tub White 2pk - Brightroom™
description:
Maintain an orderly space with the help of this 2-Pack of Open Storage Tubs from Brightroom™. These storage bins feature a rectangular silhouette with a flat base for storing anything from small accessories, to electronics and more. The open-top design provides easy access to the contents, and the cutout handles make carrying it a breeze. This pack includes two open-top storage bins in white hues for easy integration with a variety of decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
